Name: Magic
Description: Defines behaviour data of spells. Do not confuse with version in EquipParamGoods.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Dialog Message ID
Fields.Description: Message ID of Yes / No dialog issued when using magic

Fields.Name: Ignore Usage Restriction - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Usage restrictions can be ignored when the specified special effect ID is activated

Fields.Name: Requirement: ARC
Fields.Description: Can't be equipped without more PC luck

Fields.Name: AI Interrupt Type
Fields.Description: AI interrupt occurs in act (AI notification when magic is activated)

Fields.Name: Replace Magic ID
Fields.Description: ID to be replaced when the state change matches (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Reference Category [1]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Reference Category [2]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Slot Usage
Fields.Description: Number of slots required for equipment> For menu

Fields.Name: Requirement: INT
Fields.Description: Can't be equipped without more PC intelligence

Fields.Name: Requirement: FTH
Fields.Description: It cannot be equipped without the power of the PC any more.

Fields.Name: Casting Speed - DEX Start Range
Fields.Description: Motion cancel analog: Minimum skill value

Fields.Name: Casting Speed - DEX End Range
Fields.Description: Motion cancel analog: Maximum skill value

Fields.Name: Reference Category [3]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: Since there are effects (enchantment weapons, etc.) whose parameters fluctuate depending on skills, magic, items, etc., set each action so that the determined effect can correspond to the effect such as power up only weapon attack. Set None for items that do not need to be set, such as varistor.

Fields.Name: Open Menu Type
Fields.Description: Menu type to be displayed when using magic

Fields.Name: Reference Category [4]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Has SpEffect Type
Fields.Description: Specify the state change that needs to replace the magic ID

Fields.Name: Replace Category
Fields.Description: Additional conditions when replacing the magic ID

Fields.Name: Use Limit Category
Fields.Description: This item is usable if any active spEffect with the following spCategories are active.

Fields.Name: Allow in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Can it be used in multi? Can be used for both single and multi

Fields.Name: Allow only in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Is it only for multi? It cannot be used when it is a single. It can be used when it is multi.

Fields.Name: Is Shield Enchantment
Fields.Description: Is it magic to enchant guards and shields?

Fields.Name: Enable as friendly phantom
Fields.Description: Is it possible to use this magic as a friendly phantom? (Furled Finger, Hunter, Npc Furled Finger)

Fields.Name: Enable as Black Phantom
Fields.Description: Is it possible to use this magic as a hostile phantom? (All types of Invaders, Duelist, Npc Invaders, Npc's, etc...)

Fields.Name: Is Toughness Perfomed if Poise is Initial Value
Fields.Description: Whether the toughness calculation is performed even if the armor SA is the initial value. Check the toughness specification .xlsx for details

Fields.Name: Is Blocked by Warp Prohibition Effect
Fields.Description: Is it magic to warp? Magic with a check mark here is prohibited by the special effect Warp Prohibition.

Fields.Name: Usable while Riding
Fields.Description: Can it be used while riding?

Fields.Name: Not Usable while Riding
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to use while not riding?

Fields.Name: Usable in No Attack Region
Fields.Description: Can it be used in an attack-prohibited area?

Fields.Name: SFX ID - Fire
Fields.Description: SFX ID when magic is activated

Fields.Name: Toughness Correction
Fields.Description: It is a magnification that corrects the basic value of toughness.

Fields.Name: Reference Category [5]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Create Limit Group ID
Fields.Description: If it is 0, it is unused. Check the number of bullets created for the specified group Id, and if the upper limit is reached, you will not be able to use magic.

Fields.Name: Reference Category [6]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Reference Category [7]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Reference Category [8]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Reference Category [9]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Reference Category [10]
Fields.Description: Call ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special Effects]

Fields.Name: Consumption Type [1]
Fields.Description: When Reference ID [1] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.

Fields.Name: Consumption Type [2]
Fields.Description: When Reference ID [2] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.

Fields.Description: When Reference ID [3] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.

Fields.Description: When Reference ID [4] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.

Fields.Description: When Reference ID [5] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.

Fields.Description: When Reference ID [7] is called, consume FP/Stamina according to the configured cost.
